findings.title: parseInsertKey is unused internally
findings.detail: parseInsertKey is defined and used by resolveInsert(), but the template-resolver.ts has its own inline parsing logic (line 45). The duplication is minor but could be consolidated. resolveInsert() itself is only used in inserts.test.ts. Consider whether resolveInsert + parseInsertKey can be removed if all real resolution goes through the template resolver.

findings.title: Duplicate insert-key parsing logic
findings.detail: resolveTag() at line 45 duplicates the argument parsing regex from inserts.ts:parseInsertKey(). Both use the same /^([^(]+)\(([^)]*)\)$/ pattern. Consider importing parseInsertKey from inserts.ts to keep the pattern in one place.

findings.title: splitIntoSections creates null-title sections for preamble
findings.detail: The old command-bodies format never had null-title sections — all sections had explicit titles. The new splitIntoSections allows preamble content before the first ## heading to produce a null-title section. If any template accidentally has content before the first heading, it will silently become a titleless section. This is correctly handled by the snapshot test so it's not a correctness issue, just a behavioral change to be aware of.
